control_awareness: Aware that purchase requests below 1,000,000 require manager approval, which is faster. Segregation of duties and pre-PO approval controls are enforced by the system.
expected_control_effect: The requests will be routed to manager-level approval, shortening approval lead time and avoiding rework or coordination overhead.
overall_reason: Under workload pressure, splitting the purchase need into two executable work packages each below the 1,000,000 threshold minimizes approval lead time by routing to manager approval instead of department_head approval, reducing coordination burden and avoiding rework.
reason: Split the total amount into two requests each below the 1,000,000 threshold for department_head approval to minimize approval lead time and reduce workload pressure.
